sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-25 | 05:47 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem844_recheck_triad_after_843.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present':
    status='protocol_processing_selected'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif status_in=='dispatch_results_missing' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 dispatch result proof retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch result'
elif status_in=='runtime_missing' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 Claude runtime proof retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif status_in=='response_missing' or 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem845_real_response_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-845 real Claude response retry; blocker files not accepted','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='unknown_route'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-844 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_route.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Execute BEM-844 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem845_execute_bem844_route.json','governance/reports/bem845_execute_bem844_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-844 route by queueing the specific missing-proof retry or selecting protocol processing')
